_meta.description: Statutory IGAAP values transcribed by hand from official company ANNUAL REPORTS, each with page-level provenance and the exact source label. Read directly from the cited PDF pages (pypdfium2) because the generic NL-form parser mangles annual-report layouts (fused columns). These are the audited financial statements - the authoritative statutory source.
_meta.basis: statutory IGAAP (audited financial statements). NOT IFRS, NOT Ind-AS, NOT broker/dashboard estimates.
_meta.page_convention: source_page is the HUMAN page number printed/visible in the PDF reader (1-indexed).
_meta.transcribed_by: claude-code session 2026-06-08; read directly from the cited pages.
_meta.coverage: Star Health FY25 Annual Report only (the sole Star statutory source in the repo; public disclosures are source_blocked/403 and not staged). Periods limited to FY25 + FY24 (and FY23 where a 5-year summary prints it). Quarterly/H1/9M/FY26 cells have no source -> left blank.

data.source_title: Star Health & Allied Insurance FY25 Annual Report
data.basis_note: Gross Written Premium 16,781.36 cr (incl. 65.16 cr inward reinsurance accepted); Gross Direct Premium 16,716.20 cr recorded separately. Statutory IGAAP, Annexure 2 p238 row 2.
data.note: Annexure 2 'Summary of Financial Statements' p238 row 2 = 1,678,136 lakhs.
